things.name: Chichen Itza
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Maya pyramid — El Castillo is one of the New Seven Wonders of the World, 3 hours inland

things.name: Tulum Ruins
things.description: Clifftop Maya ruins overlooking the Caribbean — the most photographed archaeological site in Mexico

things.name: Hotel Zone (Zona Hotelera)
things.description: 14-km barrier island of white-sand beaches, all-inclusive resorts and the glittering Caribbean Sea

things.name: Isla Mujeres
things.description: 30-minute ferry to a car-free island — golf cart rental, Playa Norte voted one of Mexico's best beaches

things.name: Cenote Swimming
things.description: Swim in a sacred Maya sinkhole — Gran Cenote and Dos Ojos near Tulum have crystal-clear turquoise water

things.name: Xcaret Eco-Archaeological Park
things.description: Snorkel through underground rivers, swim with dolphins and see the spectacular Xcaret México Espectacular show

things.name: Cozumel Diving
things.description: 40-minute ferry from Playa del Carmen to one of the world's top dive sites — Palancar Reef in crystal clarity

things.name: Mercado 28
things.description: Downtown Cancun's local market — hammocks, embroidered textiles, jewellery and authentic cochinita pibil

things.name: Underwater Museum of Art (MUSA)
things.description: 500 life-size sculptures submerged in the Caribbean — glass-bottom boat or snorkel/dive visit

things.name: Playa del Carmen
things.description: Boutique shops, beach clubs and the famous La Quinta Avenida pedestrian strip — 1 hour south by bus
